message:
feat(output): convert cmd_update and cmd_models to Output abstraction

Continue migration from println!/colored crate to Output/rich_rust:
- Convert cmd_update function
- Convert cmd_models list and info subcommands
- Reduce println! calls from 99 to 75 (24 more conversions)

Total progress: 277 -> 75 println! calls (202 conversions, ~73% complete)
